name: io.github.meru-fin-tech/hellobooks-public
title: HelloBooks (Public)
description: Read-only knowledge endpoint for HelloBooks cloud accounting/payroll/tax SaaS. Exposes plan pricing, AI credit packs, integrations catalog, marketing feature catalog data, per-country compliance frameworks, competitor positioning, statutory deadlines, local payment methods, product videos, and a curated catalog of published articles. Plan and credit-pack pricing is federated live from hellobooks.ai. Self-describing discovery surface at the origin (HTML landing, /.well-known/agent.json, /llms.txt, /catalog.json, /sitemap.xml, RSS, OpenAPI) so AI crawlers and agent registries can index the server.
